chunks.title: Cost source: HarmCo commercial parcels (non-lot inventory)
caveat_tags: Commercial parcels are NOT residential lots; not in LotState.
allowed_uses: RAG grounding for Harmony commercial-parcel questions

chunks.title: Cost source: DataRails 38-col (BCPD 2016-17 — dedup mandatory)
caveat_tags: Raw DR sums are wrong by ~2x without dedup.
allowed_uses: RAG grounding for BCPD 2016-17 cost questions

chunks.title: Cost source: Missing cost is missing, not zero
caveat_tags: Hard rule; never violated.
allowed_uses: RAG grounding for refusal of cost-estimation queries on no-GL projects

chunks.title: Cost source: QB Register (tie-out only)
caveat_tags: Different chart of accounts; never aggregate against VF/DR.
allowed_uses: RAG grounding for BCPD vendor / cash / AP queries on 2025

chunks.title: Cost source: Range / shell rows (project+phase grain)
caveat_tags: Range rows are NEVER allocated to specific lots in v2.1.
allowed_uses: RAG grounding for shared-shell / shared-infrastructure cost questions

chunks.title: Cost source: Vertical Financials (BCPD 2018-2025 primary)
caveat_tags: VF is one-sided; not a balanced trial balance.
allowed_uses: RAG grounding for any BCPD 2018-2025 cost question

chunks.title: Coverage: ClickUp lot-tagged ↔ inventory
caveat_tags: Lot-tagging discipline is the upstream gate; only 21% of ClickUp tasks have both subdivision and lot_num.
allowed_uses: RAG grounding for ClickUp coverage and lot-tagging questions

chunks.title: Coverage: Full triangle (GL ∧ ClickUp ∧ inventory)
caveat_tags: Triangle requires all three data sources; missing any one drops a lot from the count.
allowed_uses: RAG grounding for full-triangle coverage questions

chunks.title: Coverage: GL ↔ inventory join
caveat_tags: Coverage metric is binary (≥1 GL row per inventory lot); does not imply cost completeness.
allowed_uses: RAG grounding for coverage / fill-rate questions

chunks.title: Coverage: BCPD projects with inventory but no GL
caveat_tags: Cost is unknown for these projects; do not substitute zero.
allowed_uses: RAG grounding for missing-cost / structural-gap questions

chunks.title: Coverage: Source-owner validation queue
caveat_tags: Items here gate confidence promotion from `inferred` to higher.
allowed_uses: RAG grounding for 'what's still inferred' questions

chunks.title: Project: Harmony

Range / shell rows for this project, if any, are kept at project+phase grain via `vf_unattributed_shell_dollars` — not allocated to specific lots.
